While some frequencies can be detected and analyzed, detecting extremely high-frequency signals is extremely challenging, even impractical, without highly specialized equipment. Additionally, transmitting signals directly to the brain through the nervous system would require a far more sophisticated and invasive technology than we currently have. The idea of using a galactic showcase to disguise a reality-bending technology is a popular concept in science fiction, but it remains speculative at this point.
